metadata.description: Staging area for new audit knowledge pending quality gate review before merging into knowledge_store.json

G1_SCHEMA.description: Schema validation — all required fields present and correctly typed
G1_SCHEMA.pass_criteria: All mandatory fields present, types correct, IDs unique

G2_DEDUP.description: Deduplication — no duplicate topic, risk, or procedure IDs
G2_DEDUP.pass_criteria: No duplicate IDs vs knowledge_store.json; semantic similarity < 0.85

G3_AUTHORITY.description: Source authority — knowledge sourced from credible, verifiable standards
G3_AUTHORITY.pass_criteria: At least one L0 source (credibility >= 90) in source_chain

G4_HALLUCINATION.description: Hallucination check — no fabricated standards, laws, or procedures
G4_HALLUCINATION.pass_criteria: All cited standards exist; Thai law references are real and current

G5_CERTIFICATION.description: Certification validity — IIA, INTOSAI, ISO standards correctly referenced
G5_CERTIFICATION.pass_criteria: Standard codes correct; version numbers match current published editions

G6_THAILAND.description: Thailand applicability — content applies to Thai electricity authority context
G6_THAILAND.pass_criteria: thai_law_refs populated; thailand_applicable=true; Thai terminology correct

staging_entry_template._comment: Template for new staging entries — copy and populate before submitting
